name: Turkey Stew Island Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut turkey parts into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a large skillet or saucepan, combine turkey and paprika.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, about 5 minutes until the meat is browned. Remove the turkey and set aside.
4. Add onions, green pepper, garlic, celery, and mushrooms to the skillet. Cook, stirring constantly, for about 4 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
5. Add tomatoes, chicken stock, potatoes, peas, parsley, ground pepper, thyme, and dried oregano; mix well.
6. Return the reserved turkey to the skillet.
7. Cook covered over low heat for about 40 minutes or until the meat is fork-tender.
8. Serve over hot rice.
